positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    space != duster).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    sucks(space)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~vacuum(X0) | sucks(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~sucks(duster)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    vacuum(space)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~sucks(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define plunger(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define vampire(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define household_appliance(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for negative.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for negative.tptp
5. household_appliance(duster) & ~sucks(duster) [input(axiom)]
7. ? [X0] : (household_appliance(X0) & ~sucks(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~? [X0] : (household_appliance(X0) & ~sucks(X0)) [negated conjecture 7]
12. ! [X0] : (~household_appliance(X0) | sucks(X0)) [ennf transformation 8]
15. ~sucks(duster) [cnf transformation 5]
16. household_appliance(duster) [cnf transformation 5]
18. ~household_appliance(X0) | sucks(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
19. sucks(duster) [resolution 16,18]
20. $false [forward subsumption resolution 19,15]
% SZS output end Proof for negative.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
